workstation_serial.description: Single-process local launch. Replace the launcher command with the exact command used on this machine.

launcher.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 --entrypoint sh -v '{job_dir}:/work' -v '/Users/charlie/test/mytest/nwchem-test/nwchem_basis_library:/basislib:ro' -w /work -e NWCHEM_BASIS_LIBRARY=/basislib nwchem:7.2.3 -lc 'mpirun -np 1 nwchem "$1"' _

workstation_mpi.description: Local MPI launch. Replace the launcher command and rank count to match this workstation.

launcher.command: docker run --rm --platform linux/amd64 --entrypoint sh -v '{job_dir}:/work' -v '/Users/charlie/test/mytest/nwchem-test/nwchem_basis_library:/basislib:ro' -w /work -e NWCHEM_BASIS_LIBRARY=/basislib nwchem:7.2.3 -lc 'mpirun -np {mpi_ranks} nwchem "$1"' _

workstation_wrapper.description: Local wrapper-script launch. Point the launcher command at a site-specific shell script if setup requires modules, conda, or environment sourcing.
